mapper.select: SELECT c.*, p1.category_nm AS parent_category_nm, p2.category_nm AS grand_parent_category_nm, cd_cs.code_label AS category_status_cd_nm FROM pd_category c LEFT JOIN pd_category p1 ON p1.category_id = c.parent_category_id LEFT JOIN pd_category p2 ON p2.category_id = p1.parent_category_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cs ON cd_cs.code_grp = 'USE_YN' AND cd_cs.code_value = c.category_status_cd WHERE c.category_id = #{id}

SELECT c.*, cd_cs.code_label AS category_status_cd_nm FROM pd_category c LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cs ON cd_cs.code_grp = 'USE_YN' AND cd_cs.code_value = c.category_status_cd WHERE c.site_id = #{siteId} ORDER BY c.category_depth ASC, c.sort_ord ASC

SELECT c.*, cd_cs.code_label AS category_status_cd_nm FROM pd_category c LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cs ON cd_cs.code_grp = 'USE_YN' AND cd_cs.code_value = c.category_status_cd WHERE c.parent_category_id = #{parentCategoryId} ORDER BY c.sort_ord ASC
